summary: Added the Milestone Runway to every lane Overview: a scrollable route spine built from checkpoint, gate, unlock, and trail-event data with a future-slot marker and Path, Chronicle, and Trail actions.

pattern_notes: Timeline and roadmap views should expose order, dependencies, progress, and work still ahead.
Journey-map patterns are useful because they show touchpoints, pain points, and current blockers rather than only finished tasks.
Milestone timelines use visible checkpoints to communicate progress quickly.
The Atlas version should celebrate unlocked progress without hiding gates, blockers, or pending-review states.

data_contract: renderMilestoneRunway(lane) appears after the Quest Cockpit in the lane Overview.
Runway actions are local detail-view navigation only: Path, Chronicle, and Trail.
No new schema was introduced; future lane checkpoints, gates, outcomes, and trail records extend the runway automatically.
ui_notes: The route spine uses a progress rail, node rarity, compact stats, and a future-slot card for expandable lane growth.
The horizontal track scrolls independently so long lanes can keep growing without causing page overflow.
Mobile layout uses two stat columns and wider runway cards for readable touch navigation.

red.result: Expected failure before implementation: panel false, nodes 0, checkpointNodes 0, gateNodes 0, unlockNodes 0, eventNodes 0, stats 0, actions []

static: ASCII verified for web/index.html, web/app.js, web/styles.css, web/README.md

green.result: ok true; panel true; nodes 15; checkpointNodes 5; gateNodes 2; unlockNodes 3; eventNodes 5; futureNodes 1; stats 4; actions [chronicle,path,trail]; trackScrolls true; overflow false; clipped []

interaction.result: ok true; PATH changed hash to view=path with active path tab and visible Path Map; LOG changed hash to view=chronicle with active chronicle tab and visible Chronicle; TRL changed hash to view=trail with active trail tab and visible Trail.

responsive: phone 390: ok true, nodes 15, statColumns 2, trackScrolls true, pageOverflow false, clipped []
desktop 1280: ok true, nodes 15, statColumns 4, trackScrolls true, pageOverflow false, clipped []
wide 1600: ok true, nodes 15, statColumns 4, trackScrolls true, pageOverflow false, clipped []

next_actions: Add a lane-specific runway filter for blocker-only, unlock-only, and event-only views.
Generate animated future-slot artwork that can change by realm or minigame type.
Let new lane families choose alternate runway skins without changing the shared data contract.
